sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110981" key="fi/lhbos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φίληβος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἥβη</etym>) <sense id="n110981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving youth:</tr_> only as pr. n. <title_ TEIform="title">Philebus.</title_> </sense> </entryFree>
